git commit -m t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling [planning]: write 8-step plan with 9 traceable requirements and 4 milestones

Plan integrates the three research outputs into a concrete implementation
strategy: copy t0018 paper-asset utilities, build 5 priority-1 paper assets
(Ezra-Tsur2021, Stincic2023, Gruntman2018, Haag2018, Anderson1999), then
priority-2 batches with a stop-on-diminishing-returns criterion (12 floor,
25 ceiling), then write the synthesis answer asset. Cost $0, no remote
compute, no paid API. Verificator PASSED 0/0.
